title: hyptis dictyodea
intro: Hyptis dictyodea, also known as the Mexican tea or hierba de San Andrés, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to act as a digestive aid and a treatment for various infections. The health benefits of Hyptis dictyodea include its potential to reduce symptoms of menopause, alleviate stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. Hyptis dictyodea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its antiseptic properties.
